node.html: Production-style FHIR R4 pipeline processing NDJSON exports across 10 clinical resource types — Patient, Observation, Condition, Encounter, MedicationRequest — into MongoDB, preserving schema integrity for clinical analytics, CDS services, and EHR integration use cases.

Architected a 26-tool AI agent handling end-to-end workflows: natural language intake, receipt image analysis via vision API, multi-turn conversation management, and proactive alerting — with a dedicated non-technical end-user interface via WhatsApp/Twilio and a real-time analytics dashboard. Resolved production failures including tool sequencing errors and prompt drift.

Contributed to a peer-reviewed clinical research study evaluating smartphone-based semen analysis under real-world conditions, comparing remote assessments with laboratory-based CASA measurements.

Highlights:

  • Analyzed agreement, reproducibility, and diagnostic performance across remote and laboratory-based measurements
  • Worked with clinical datasets involving sperm concentration, motility, and related quality metrics
  • Findings support smartphone-based systems as scalable tools for population-level research and clinical screening

Designed a randomized controlled trial evaluating whether a combined plant-based diet and diaphragmatic breathing intervention improves diastolic blood pressure in adults aged 60+.

Developed hypotheses, eligibility criteria, outcome measures, and a seed-grant proposal aligned with healthcare systems.

Built an enterprise sales analytics dashboard that reduced reporting time by 35% through automated refresh workflows and streamlined reporting.

Highlights:

  • Revenue, profitability, and customer segmentation analysis
  • Time intelligence measures and KPI reporting
  • SQL-backed model with reliable refresh and validation checks
